name: PRICE T ROWE GROUP INC
summary: PART I . T. Rowe Price Group, Inc. (T. Rowe Price Group, T. Rowe Price, the firm, we, us, or our) is a financial services holding company that provides global investment advisory services through its subsidiaries to investors worldwide. We identify and actively invest in opportunities to help people thrive in an evolving world.
